author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Add TruffleHog OSS verified-secret scanning to the security workflow and complete free GitHub secret-scanning toggles

TruffleHog OSS job (SHA-pinned release) green in the Security and Script Quality workflow on push/PR with verified+unknown results failing the job; GitHub secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns and secret_scanning_validity_checks enabled via API (both free on public repos); no secrets found on the initial full scan

message: Maintainer directive 2026-07-14: fully set up trufflehog-oss using only free features. Repo already has secret_scanning + push_protection + Dependabot security updates + private vulnerability reporting enabled; the two remaining free toggles (non-provider patterns, validity checks) get enabled alongside. TruffleHog adds live-credential verification on top of Trivy's pattern-based secret scan — complements, does not replace. Related pm-pim7 (pm-side secret guard for item text) — this covers the repo/CI side.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: GitHub toggle attempt 2026-07-14: PATCH /repos with security_and_analysis.secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns/.secret_scanning_validity_checks = enabled returns 200 but the values stay 'disabled' (verified via GET after retry with JSON body and form syntax) — silently ignored for this user-namespace public repo; these two appear UI-gated. Maintainer UI path: Settings → Advanced Security → Secret Protection → enable 'Non-provider patterns' and 'Validity checks' (both FREE on public repos). Already-enabled free surface verified live: secret_scanning, secret_scanning_push_protection, dependabot_security_updates, private vulnerability reporting.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: TruffleHog OSS job (SHA-pinned release) green in the Security and Script Quality workflow on push/PR with verified+unknown results failing the job; no secrets found on the initial scan; GitHub secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns and secret_scanning_validity_checks either enabled or (API-gated, verified 2026-07-14) documented with exact free UI steps for the maintainer

message: AC adjusted: the two GH toggles are UI-gated (API PATCH silently ignored); steps documented in comments.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation: TruffleHog job added to security.yml — trufflesecurity/trufflehog@27b0417c (v3.95.9), fetch-depth:0, extra_args '--results=verified,unknown --exclude-paths=.trufflehog-exclude-paths.txt'. Local full-history scan with the pinned binary: 0 verified secrets; sole 'unknown' = deliberate test fixture https://[redacted-test-fixture-uri] in tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts (DNS-unverifiable) — excluded via unanchored path regex (anchored ^...$ does NOT match in git mode; trap noted). Post-exclusion scan exit 0 / 0 findings printed.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Redact quoted basic-auth test-fixture URI from implementation comment — it tripped the new TruffleHog gate on the pm history stream itself (never quote secret-pattern literals into pm text).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Gate self-test (first live catch): the initial push went RED because my own implementation comment quoted the basic-auth fixture URI verbatim — the literal landed in this item's history JSONL and TruffleHog flagged the pm store itself (2 unknown results, exit 183). Remediation: pm history-redact pm-4ris (regex redaction, 1 replacement, hash chain recomputed, verify_ok:true — first production use of history-redact) + excluded this item's two store paths in .trufflehog-exclude-paths.txt because the pre-redaction literal is permanent in git blob history. Rule reinforced: NEVER quote secret-pattern literals into pm text, even to describe a fixture. Full-history rescan with pinned binary: 0 findings.

patch.value: TruffleHog job green on push/PR failing on verified+unknown results, no secrets on initial scan, remaining GH toggles enabled or documented

Job green on main after first live catch: the gate flagged a fixture-URI quote in this very item's history — redacted via first production pm history-redact (hash chain verify_ok) + two-path exclusion for the permanent git blobs; full-history scan 0 verified/0 unknown; non-provider-patterns + validity-checks toggles are API-gated, exact free UI steps documented in comments

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: TruffleHog OSS verified-secret scanning live in the security workflow; repo history clean; gate proved itself on first push.

message: TruffleHog OSS verified-secret scanning live in the security workflow; repo history clean; gate proved itself on first push.
